pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh which creates this directory, and in export_result.sh which evaluates the project directory.
Task description and verifier scripts (export_result.sh, verifier.py) all expect 'docker-compose.yml'.
Extracted from run_commands.sh created by setup_task.sh and expected by verifier.py.
Extracted from run_commands.sh created by setup_task.sh where docker run commands expose these exact ports.
Extracted from run_commands.sh created by setup_task.sh, matching the 'docker pull' and 'docker run' commands.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires converting a legacy script in /home/ga/monitoring-stack into a docker-compose.yml file. The stack consists of three services: prometheus (using image prom/prometheus:v2.53.0 on port 9090), grafana (using image grafana/grafana:11.0.0 on port 3000), and node-exporter (using image prom/node-exporter:v1.8.1 on port 9100). All configurations are synthetically generated by the task's setup script.
